OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: JPT Gilbert Jay, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Mia Mangalo, property manager, appearing for plaintiff Mosser Companies.
David Wasserman representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Patrick Durkin is present.
Marisa Deutsch representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. JPT, counsel and parties meet privately for settlement discussions.

Case has settled, trial date is off calendar.
